title: Iran’s Neighbors Long for a Deal, Any Deal, to End the War
summary_full: Business owners in Pakistan are getting impatient for a chance to finally trade goods and oil along their long shared border with Iran.
summary_public: Business owners in Pakistan are getting impatient for a chance to finally trade goods and oil along their long shared border with Iran.
